mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( mnum, id, pwd, name, nick, email, verified, mphone, grade, storecode, storeaddr, logintype, authority, regdate ) VALUES ( member_seq.NEXTVAL, #{id}, #{pwd}, #{name}, #{nick}, #{email}, 'N', #{mphone}, 'REGULAR',#{storecode}, #{storeaddr}, 'LOCAL','MEMBER',SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(email) FROM member WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM member WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(nick) FROM member WHERE nick = #{nick}
SELECT mnum, id, name, nick, email, mphone, grade, storecode, storeaddr, authority, regdate FROM member WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET nick = #{nick}, mphone = #{mphone}, storeaddr = #{storeaddr} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE member SET grade = 'WITHDRAWN' WHERE mnum = #{mnum}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) cnt FROM community
cwriter like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
ctitle like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
ccontent like '%' || #{searchValue} || '%'
